query:
SELECT 'books' AS tbl, COUNT(*) AS demo_rows FROM books WHERE title LIKE 'Test %' OR title LIKE '%demo%' OR title LIKE '%placeholder%' OR title LIKE '%fake%'
UNION ALL SELECT 'assignmentSubmissions',COUNT(*) FROM assignmentSubmissions WHERE COALESCE(title,'') LIKE '%demo%' OR COALESCE(title,'') LIKE '%placeholder%' OR COALESCE(title,'') LIKE '%fake%' OR COALESCE(title,'') LIKE 'Test %'
UNION ALL SELECT 'moodLogs', COUNT(*) FROM moodLogs WHERE COALESCE(label,'') LIKE '%demo%' OR COALESCE(label,'') LIKE '%fake%' OR COALESCE(label,'') LIKE '%seed%'
UNION ALL SELECT 'moodSignals', COUNT(*) FROM moodSignals WHERE COALESCE(source,'') LIKE '%demo%' OR COALESCE(source,'') LIKE '%fake%' OR COALESCE(source,'') LIKE '%seed%'
UNION ALL SELECT 'powerschool_grades', COUNT(*) FROM powerschool_grades WHERE COALESCE(courseName,'') LIKE '%demo%' OR COALESCE(courseName,'') LIKE '%fake%';
